title: Touchup test scripts for some minor nits
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

I ran the auth tests for the first time on a new vm apparently and found that it wasn't creating the auth directory or starting up Docker as it should.  I've fixed that up and touched up the intro comments a bit.  I've also touched up a bad comment in the baseline test, added a little more intro verbiage and removed a number of extra blank lines.

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit f050230 has been approved by `rhatdan`
